title: The Hollywood Revue of 1929
director: Charles Reisner, Christy Cabanne, Norman Houston
writer: Al Boasberg, Robert E. Hopkins, Joseph Farnham
actors: Conrad Nagel, Jack Benny, John Gilbert
plot: An all-star revue featuring MGM contract players.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
